accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text; CRA mechanism and rule details correctly described.

no_hallucinations.why: The description of CRA requirements (passage by both chambers, presidential approval) is accurate real-world context.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the resolution as nullifying the EPA heavy-duty vehicle standards rule via the CRA.

changes_to_existing_law.why: States the rule shall have no force or effect.

effective_dates.why: No separate effective date; correctly notes no delayed effective dates.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the targeted rule, CRA mechanism, Fed. Reg. citation, and operative nullification.
